title: Anthropic's Workflow Patterns: Simple Over Complex

questions.question: How does Anthropic distinguish a workflow from an agent?
questions.question_zh: Anthropic 如何区分 workflow 和 agent？
options: Workflows use embeddings; agents use tools
Workflows are engineer-owned predefined graphs; agents are model-owned dynamic tool direction
Workflows run on CPUs; agents need GPUs
Workflows are stateless; agents are stateful
options_zh: Workflow 用 embedding，agent 用工具
Workflow 是工程师拥有的、预先定义的图；agent 是模型拥有的、动态指挥工具的过程
Workflow 在 CPU 上跑，agent 需要 GPU
Workflow 无状态，agent 有状态
questions.explanation: Workflow = predefined code path the engineer owns; agent = the model owns the graph.
questions.explanation_zh: Workflow = 工程师拥有的预定义代码路径；agent = 模型拥有这张图。

questions.question: What are the three capabilities of the augmented LLM that underpins all five patterns?
questions.question_zh: 支撑这五种模式的 augmented LLM 具备哪三项能力？
questions.explanation: The atomic unit is one LLM with retrieval, tools, and memory wired in.
questions.explanation_zh: 原子单元是一个接好了 retrieval、tools 和 memory 的 LLM。

questions.question: Which is NOT one of the five Anthropic workflow patterns?
questions.question_zh: 下列哪一个不属于 Anthropic 的五种 workflow 模式？
questions.explanation: The five are prompt chaining, routing, parallelization, orchestrator-workers, evaluator-optimizer. Gradient distillation is a training concept.
questions.explanation_zh: 五种是 prompt chaining、routing、parallelization、orchestrator-workers、evaluator-optimizer；gradient distillation 是训练领域的概念。

questions.question: Which two shapes does parallelization come in?
options: Sectioning (different chunks) and voting (same prompt N times, aggregate)
options_zh: Sectioning（拆成不同片段）和 voting（同一个 prompt 跑 N 次再聚合）
questions.explanation: Parallelization is sectioning or voting; both fan out N calls and aggregate.
questions.explanation_zh: Parallelization 要么是 sectioning 要么是 voting；两者都是扇出 N 次调用再聚合。

questions.question: Which workflow pattern is Self-Refine generalized?
questions.question_zh: 哪一种 workflow 模式是 Self-Refine 的泛化？
questions.explanation: Evaluator-optimizer is the Anthropic name for the Self-Refine / CRITIC iterative pattern.
questions.explanation_zh: Evaluator-optimizer 是 Anthropic 给 Self-Refine / CRITIC 这种迭代模式起的名字。

questions.question: When do workflows beat agents according to the lesson?
questions.question_zh: 按本节课的说法，workflow 在什么情况下胜过 agent？
options: On predictable, cost-bounded, or compliance-bounded tasks where the graph can be enumerated and audited
options_zh: 在那些可预测、有成本或合规边界、且整张图可以被枚举和审计的任务上
questions.explanation: Workflows are cheaper, easier to debug, and auditable; pick them when steps are knowable.
questions.explanation_zh: Workflow 更便宜、更易 debug、可审计；当步骤可以确定时就选它。

questions.question: What is the lesson's recommended default starting point?
questions.question_zh: 本节课推荐的默认起点是什么？
options: Direct API calls; add frameworks only when durable state, actor concurrency, or role templating earns its cost
options_zh: 直接调用 API；只有当需要持久状态、actor 并发或角色模板时才引入框架
questions.explanation: Schluntz and Zhang: start simple; add framework complexity only when justified.
questions.explanation_zh: Schluntz 和 Zhang 的建议：从简单开始；只有在确实划得来时才加入框架带来的复杂度。
